description: Infographic on a black textured asphalt background with a faint photograph of metal handcuffs in the lower-right area. The top headline in white reads 'Number of law enforcement officers needed to arrest a criminal alien:'. Two labeled banner tabs split the layout: a red banner 'UNCOOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS' above a large white '8 to 10', and a blue banner 'COOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS' above a large white '2', separated by a vertical divider. Body text on the left reads 'ICE needs more officers to help protect the public from unpredictable behavior by an at-large criminal attempting to evade justice.' Body text on the right reads 'ICE can arrest a criminal alien with as few as two officers in a safe, controlled location, like a jail or court lockup area.' The bottom-left shows the DHS seal with 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' and the bottom-right shows the URL 'ICE.gov/detainers.'
notable_text: Number of law enforcement officers needed to arrest a criminal alien: UNCOOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS 8 to 10 / COOPERATIVE JURISDICTIONS 2 / ICE.gov/detainers
